rules.rule_text:
rule WatchBog_Cython
{
	meta:
		copyright = "Intezer Labs"
		author = "Intezer Labs"
		reference = "https://www.intezer.com"

	strings:
		$a0 = "/tmp/.parttttzone"
		$a1 = "__pyx_kp_s_watchbog_dev"
		$a2 = "__pyx_k_watchbog_dev"
		$a3 = "__pyx_n_s_watchbog"
		$a4 = "__pyx_k_watchbog"
		$b0 = "jail.BlueKeep"
		$b1 = "jail.Pwn"
		$b2 = "jail.Crack"
		$b3 = "jail.Solr"
		$b4 = "jail.Jira"
		$b5 = "jail.Couchdb"
		$b6 = "jail.Jenkins"
		$b7 = "jail.Laravel"
		$b8 = "jail.Bot"

	condition:
		any of ( $a* ) and 2 of ( $b* )
}
